This is a night recording in an oak forest with open areas. It was used an Ultrasound Microphone (Pettersson u256). Temperature about 18ºC. There is a nearby male of Pholidoptera griseoaptera, also a nearby female of Phaneroptera and a more distant male of Phaneroptera nana. The sonogram shows 3 seconds long segment, the lower frequencies filtered for clarity. The whole recording is 23 seconds long: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/316154047
